name: Cinnamon Coffee Yeast Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. COOL THE MILK TO LUKEWARM.
2. ADD YEAST; MIX WELL AND LET STAND.
3. MIX BUTTER, SUGAR AND SALT TOGETHER.
4. ADD TO YEAST MIXTURE.
5. STIR IN ENOUGH FLOUR TO MAKE A SOFT DOUGH.
6. KNEAD UNTIL SMOOTH AND ELASTIC ON A LIGHTLY FLOURED BOARD.
7. PLACE IN A GREASED BOWL, COVER AND LET RISE UNTIL DOUBLED.
8. TURN OUT ONTO FLOURED BOARD AND KNEAD FOR 30 SECONDS.
9. ROLL DOUGH OUT TO 1.4 INCHES THICKNESS AND CUT WITH A 2-INCH BISCUIT CUTTER.
10. DIP ROUNDS INTO MELTED BUTTER THEN INTO REMAINING SUGAR-CINNAMON MIX.
11. PLACE INTO A WELL BUTTERED RING MOLD.
12. BAKE AT 350 DEG F FOR 25 MINUTES OR UNTIL GOLDEN BROWN.
